inputs.label: Total Imported Tonnes (steel/aluminum/cement/fertilizer/hydrogen)
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of CBAM-covered goods imported in the reporting period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total mass of CBAM-covered goods imported in the reporting period.

inputs.label: Embedded Emissions per Tonne
inputs.businessContext: Direct and indirect GHG emissions embedded in the imported goods (scope 1+2).

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct and indirect GHG emissions embedded in the imported goods (scope 1+2).

inputs.label: Carbon Price Paid in Country of Origin
inputs.businessContext: Effective carbon price already paid in the exporting country (e.g., EU ETS equivalent).

label_i18n.en: Carbon Price Paid in Country of Origin

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective carbon price already paid in the exporting country (e.g., EU ETS equivalent).

inputs.label: CBAM Certificate Price (current auction)
inputs.businessContext: Latest weekly average auction price of CBAM certificates.

businessContext_i18n.en: Latest weekly average auction price of CBAM certificates.

inputs.label: Free Allocation Factor for Sector
inputs.businessContext: Proportion of emissions covered by free allowances in the EU ETS for the product sector.

businessContext_i18n.en: Proportion of emissions covered by free allowances in the EU ETS for the product sector.

inputs.label: Verification Status of Embedded Emissions
inputs.businessContext: Whether the embedded emissions data has been independently verified by an accredited body.

businessContext_i18n.en: Whether the embedded emissions data has been independently verified by an accredited body.

inputs.label: Compliance Deadline Met (quarterly report submitted)
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if the importer submitted the required CBAM report before the quarterly deadline.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates if the importer submitted the required CBAM report before the quarterly deadline.

rules.description: Self-declared emissions incur a 20% penalty on embedded emissions for compliance calculation.
Late submission triggers a fixed penalty of 5000 EUR.
If no goods imported, compliance is automatically satisfied.

thresholds.alert: High embedded emissions detected – consider sourcing from lower-carbon suppliers.
CBAM cost exceeds 50,000 EUR – review carbon price paid and free allocation.
Using default emission factors – strongly recommend third-party verification to reduce risk.
